root.name: Convert all bullet points on slide 19 to numbered list format
root.description: Evaluates whether all bullet points on slide 19 have been converted to a numbered list format, with no extraneous changes.

children.name: All bullet points are converted to numbered lists on slide 19
children.description: Checks that every bullet list shape on slide 19 is now a numbered list, preserving the text content.

children.name: No extraneous changes on slide 19
children.description: Checks that no additional non-list changes (e.g., to non-bullet elements or slide layout) were made on slide 19.

children.name: No changes to other slides
children.description: Checks that slides other than slide 19 have not been modified in any way, including added/removed/modified slides, shapes, text, animations, or transitions.

metadata.task: Convert all the bullet points into a numbered list format on slide 19
